name: Guangzhou Risong Intelligent Technology Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Risong Intelligent Technology Holding Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of robots, intelligent technology equipment, and other solutions in China. The company offers industrial robots, intelligent robot equipment, and intelligent technology equipment for welding applications in automobile, automotive, elevator, motorcycle, and 3C electronic industries. Guangzhou Risong Intelligent Technology Holding Co., Ltd. Was founded in 1995 and is based in Guangzhou, China.
